title: Head of Revenue Operations
location: New York, NY (with Tel Aviv HQ collaboration)
description: Reporting to the CRO, this hands-on leadership role builds and scales the operational backbone of Finout's go-to-market engine. Requires 7+ years in Revenue Operations, Sales Ops, or Strategy within high-growth B2B SaaS, experience scaling RevOps beyond $30M+ ARR, deep Salesforce administration and revenue analytics expertise, and cross-functional leadership across Sales, Marketing, Finance, and HR. Involves collaborating with globally distributed teams including the Tel Aviv HQ. Finout is a cloud cost management company trusted by brands like The New York Times, Wiz, and Lyft, with 100+ employees across Tel Aviv and New York.
score_reason: Exceptional match: Senior RevOps executive with 15+ years B2B SaaS experience aligns perfectly with Head of Revenue Operations requirements (7+ years, scaling beyond $30M ARR, Salesforce expertise). Fintech adjacency (cloud cost management) and Tel Aviv HQ collaboration provide additional cultural/geographic advantages.
ai_opener: Omri, I came across Finout's Head of Revenue Operations opening and immediately thought of you—building scalable RevOps infrastructure for high-growth B2B SaaS is exactly where your 15+ years of experience shines. Your track record scaling GTM operations, combined with your Tel Aviv background and fluency in complex Salesforce deployments and pipeline forecasting, makes this a rare alignment with a CRO-level role at a fintech company trusted by tier-1 brands. I'd love to explore whether this next challenge excites you.

title: RevOps Manager, Territory Strategy & Operations
description: This Revenue Operations Manager focuses on territory strategy and operations, accelerating revenue growth and seller productivity through data-driven investment strategy and scalable territory design. The architect of the Territory Strategy & Operations framework, you'll manage the operating cadence, support cross-functional GTM initiatives, and partner with Sales leadership, Strategy, and Finance to optimize territory compositions. Requires excellent cross-functional collaboration and stakeholder management skills and comfort navigating ambiguity in a fast-paced, high-growth environment. Salary range is $149,000-$175,000 USD.
score_reason: Excellent match for a senior RevOps executive—territory strategy, pipeline forecasting, cross-functional GTM leadership, and sales operations optimization align perfectly with Omri's core strengths. Remote US role meets location requirements, though note this is outside his preferred geographic zones.
ai_opener: Omri, your 15+ years building scalable RevOps frameworks in B2B SaaS make you an ideal fit for Gong's Territory Strategy & Operations Manager role. Having architected territory design, pipeline forecasting, and seller productivity initiatives, you'd excel at the data-driven investment strategy and cadence management this role demands—especially at a company that lives and breathes go-to-market intelligence.

title: Revenue Operations Manager
description: As Warp's first Revenue Operations hire, you'll work across Sales, Marketing, Growth, and Product to make the funnel predictable, efficient, and scalable. You'll inherit a stack from a fractional RevOps agency, own it, and level it up. Requires 4-8+ years at B2B SaaS orgs, ideally with a PLG motion and an enterprise sales team. You'll be the hands-on owner of a CRM and core funnel workflows (routing, lifecycle stages, pipeline hygiene, automation). High-agency, pragmatic operators who ship, iterate, and drive adoption without a big team will thrive.

The role's emphasis on pragmatic execution, pipeline hygiene, and scaling without heavy overhead matches his proven operator profile.

I'd love to explore how I can make your funnel predictable and efficient while your team stays focused on product and sales motion.

title: GTM Engineer
description: Conveo seeks a GTM Engineer who can code, ship, and iterate on internal tools and automations that make the GTM team highly effective. You'll replace manual workflows and spreadsheets with purpose-built apps, pipelines, and AI-powered workflows—lead scoring models that learn, attribution pipelines that work, onboarding flows, and AI agents that eliminate manual work. Conveo is an AI research platform enabling fast, affordable, high-quality consumer/B2B research, used by global brands like Unilever, Google, and Orange. The coding/shipping requirement is a secondary skill for a RevOps exec rather than primary strength.
